release_notes:
History redesign

• Replaced log-dump history with clear run summaries
• At-a-glance stat pills: files tagged, skipped, errors, Gemini cost
• Smart error grouping — 100s of duplicate errors collapse into counted rows
• View Full Log modal with live search, copy, and download
• Windows parity: .arw thumbnails now appear in the Search view
• Minor Windows build + cross-platform polish
